Headline: #90 Harlem Temporary Reroute at Harlem/Palmer
ShortDescription: #90 Harlem buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Harlem, Grand, Oak Park, North Avenue and Harlem due to police activity near Harlem/Palmer.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#90 Harlem buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Harlem, Grand, Oak Park, North Avenue, then resume their normal route on Harlem.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to police activity near Harlem/Palmer.
